title: Diplodium alobulum
taxonomy: Diplodium alobulum is a species of orchid. It belongs to the family Orchidaceae. Diplodium alobulum is a type of epiphytic orchid native to Australia. The species is classified under the genus Diplodium, which is a part of the subtribe Pterostylidinae. Diplodium alobulum is closely related to other species within the same genus.
